figures.caption: Fig. 2: ACF. Autocorrelation function for each of the state-space models used in this work. Each plot is obtained by averaging multiple ACF estimates.
Fig. 3: LGSSM. Results for the inference problem for the dynamics covariance. We plot errors vs number of simulations, bottom left is best.
Fig. 4: SVSSM. Results for the inference problem for the correlation matrix. We plot errors vs number of simulations, bottom left is best.
Fig. 5: LVSSM. Results for the inference problem for the reaction rates. We plot errors vs number of simulations, bottom left is best.

Fig. 6: Rank statistics histograms for each of the algorithms tested in the LGSSM of Fig. 3. A histogram that is closer to the uniform distribution indicates better calibration of the posterior. Each histogram plots 100 samples in 10 bins.
